interviewProcess: Round: Coding (DSA problems like Three Sum and Kth Largest Element in an Array)
Round: System Design (Design a search product like Facebook)
dsaTopics: Kth Largest Element in an Array
systemDesignTopics: Design a search product like Facebook
behavioralQuestions: Tell me about a time you failed.
Tell me about a challenge you faced and how you overcame it.
Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
How do you handle conflict with a team member?
